member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Stores the 3Tide plugin configuration.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SeerrApiKey
member.summary: Seerr administrator API key. This value must never be exposed to frontend JavaScript.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SeerrLanguage
member.summary: Language used for Seerr discovery and search results.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SeerrDiscoveryLimit
member.summary: Number of discovery results returned to the frontend.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SeerrAutoApproveRequests
member.summary: Automatically approve requests when supported. Keep disabled initially.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrController
member.summary: Provides the internal 3Tide API for Seerr.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrController.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Seerr.ISeerrService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrController.GetStatusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests the configured Seerr connection.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrController.GetTrendingAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns trending movies and series from Seerr.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrController.SearchAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches movies and series through Seerr.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrController.RequestMediaAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrRequestBody,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submits a media request to Seerr.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.ThreeTideApiError
member.summary: Standard error response for the internal 3Tide API.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.ThreeTideApiError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Standard error response for the internal 3Tide API.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrRequestBody
member.summary: Request body for submitting a Seerr media request.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrRequestBody.MediaId
member.summary: Gets or sets the TMDB id of the movie or series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrRequestBody.MediaType
member.summary: Gets or sets the media type ("movie" or "tv").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Controllers.SeerrRequestBody.Seasons
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional season numbers to request (TV only).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Core.Constants
member.summary: Zentrale Konstanten für das 3Tide Plugin.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Plugin
member.summary: The main 3Tide plugin.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.summary: Gets the configuration service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Plugin.ThemeService
member.summary: Gets the theme service.

member.summary: Gets the branding service.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Plugin.ReadEmbeddedText(System.String)
member.summary: Reads an embedded frontend asset.

member.summary: Standardwerte und Ressourcen des 3Tide-Brandings.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Branding.BrandingInjector
member.summary: Erzeugt das CSS für das 3Tide-Branding.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Branding.BrandingService
member.summary: Verwaltet das aktive Branding.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Branding.IBrandingService
member.summary: Stellt die aktuell konfigurierte 3Tide-Marke bereit.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Branding.LogoManager
member.summary: Prüft und normalisiert Logo-Adressen.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.ConfigurationService
member.summary: Zugriff auf die Plugin-Konfiguration.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Seerr.ISeerrService.RequestMediaAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submits a media request to Seerr.
member.param: The TMDB id of the movie or series.
Optional season numbers to request (TV only). Pass null to let Seerr use its default behaviour (typically all seasons).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Seerr.SeerrApiException
member.summary: Represents an error returned by the Seerr API.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Seerr.SeerrConfigurationException
member.summary: Represents an invalid or incomplete Seerr configuration.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Seerr.SeerrConnectionResult
member.summary: Result of a Seerr connectivity test.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Seerr.SeerrConnectionResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Result of a Seerr connectivity test.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Services.Seerr.SeerrService
member.summary: Secure server-side client for the configured Seerr instance.

member.summary: Registers 3Tide services.

member.summary: Verwaltet das 3Tide Theme.

member.summary: Registers the File Transformation callback at startup.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Transformations.IndexHtmlTransformation
member.summary: Injects the 3Tide frontend assets into Jellyfin Web.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ThreeTide.Transformations.IndexHtmlTransformation.Transform(System.Object)
member.summary: Applies the 3Tide transformation to Jellyfin's index.html. File Transformation 2.5.x expects a string as return value.
